headlines.title: Elon Musk loses court battle against Sam Altman and OpenAI after 3-week trial
headlines.summary: A jury in Oakland, California, ruled against Elon Musk in his dramatic court battle with Sam Altman and OpenAI.

headlines.title: Trump pivots to midterms, affordability after China summit as Iran war persists
headlines.summary: Trump, at a White House event Monday, is expected to announce an expansion of the number of discounted prescription drugs offered through TrumpRX.

headlines.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
headlines.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."

headlines.title: Seagate leads memory sell-off as CEO says it would 'take too long' to build new factories
headlines.summary: Seagate CEO Dave Mosley's comment sent shares sinking, along with those of Micron, SanDisk and Western Digital.

headlines.title: Kevin Warsh to be sworn in as Federal Reserve chair on Friday
headlines.summary: Trump will swear in Kevin Warsh, his hand-picked choice to lead the Federal Reserve, during a White House ceremony.

headlines.title: U.S. creates $1.8B 'lawfare' fund in exchange for Trump dropping $10B IRS suit
headlines.summary: Trump sued the IRS in late January over the leak of his tax information by an IRS employee, Charles "Chaz" Littlejohn, in 2019 and 2020.

headlines.title: Higher aluminum prices are powering one former Dow component. Here's how to buy for less
headlines.summary: Despite elevated aluminum production costs and shipment timing issues, Alcoa (AA) is strongly capitalizing on structurally higher prices.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
headlines.summary: Robust spending and strong demand for AI infrastructure have reinforced analysts' confidence in several stocks after earnings season.

headlines.title: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.

headlines.title: Berkshire's new CEO overhauls portfolio, dumping a slate of stocks
headlines.summary: Berkshire Hathaway's equity portfolio got one of its biggest renovations ever during Greg Abel's first three months as the company's CEO.

headlines.title: Berkshire Hathaway returns to airlines with $2.6 billion stake in Delta Air Lines
headlines.summary: The Omaha-based company built a position worth more than $2.6 billion, making Delta Berkshire's 14th-largest holding at the end of March.

headlines.title: Elon Musk has lost his case against OpenAI and Sam Altman
headlines.summary: Musk intends to appeal the verdict, according to his lawyer.

headlines.title: The bond market has a warning for the Fed: Get serious about inflation and potential rate hikes ASAP
headlines.summary: Tough talk from the Federal Reserve about rate hikes may be needed to ease the Treasury market’s rout.

headlines.title: Most people make this retirement mistake. You might still have time to fix it.
headlines.summary: Are you prepared for the retirement you might get?

headlines.title: Nvidia’s earnings will play second fiddle to these big investor debates
headlines.summary: Morgan Stanley is looking to see how Nvidia is managing the memory crunch and whether it can generate significant revenue outside of GPUs.

candidates.thesis: NVIDIA is a leader in AI and compute infrastructure, benefiting from secular growth in AI adoption and high-performance computing. Strong fundamentals and recent pullback make it attractive for long-term positioning.

candidates.thesis: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing is critical to global chip production, with strong positioning in advanced semiconductor nodes. Long-term demand for chips in AI, 5G, and IoT supports its growth.
candidates.risk: Stop at 340 (below SMA200), target at 500 (secular growth potential)

candidates.thesis: Marvell Technology is positioned to benefit from AI, cloud infrastructure, and 5G adoption. Strong growth trajectory and recent pullback provide an attractive entry point.

candidates.thesis: ARM Holdings is a leader in chip architecture, benefiting from secular growth in AI, IoT, and edge computing. Recent IPO provides an opportunity to capitalize on long-term industry trends.
candidates.risk: Stop at 150 (below SMA200), target at 300 (long-term growth potential)

candidates.thesis: ASML is the dominant supplier of lithography equipment for advanced semiconductor manufacturing. Its unique position in the supply chain and secular growth in chip demand make it a compelling long-term investment.
